column1: Unique ID, e.g. BJ, SH, XA
column4: 2-3 sentences for AI context. Focus on what makes it unique for international tourists.
column10: Comma-separated: historical, modern, nature, food, nightlife

column4: China's capital and political center, home to 3,000 years of history. The Forbidden City, Great Wall, and hutong alleys offer an unmatched blend of imperial grandeur and local life.
China's most cosmopolitan city, where Art Deco heritage meets futuristic skyscrapers. Known for its food scene, nightlife, and as a gateway to water towns.
The ancient starting point of the Silk Road and home to the Terracotta Warriors. The Muslim Quarter offers some of China's best street food.

China's cyberpunk megacity built on mountains where two rivers meet. Famous worldwide on TikTok for its vertiginous skyline, hotpot, and surreal urban landscapes where trains pass through apartment buildings.
column10: nightlife, food, tiktok, cyberpunk, mountain-city, hotpot
